companies.name: IME Limited
companies.description: IME Limited is a prominent player in the remittance sector of Nepal and has also set up a coveted global eminence. With over 150,000 global locations, the international network of IME Remit spans over 25 countries, including Malaysia, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Japan, the United Kingdom, the United States, and India.

companies.name: IME Khalti Ltd.
companies.description: IME Khalti Limited is Nepal’s largest capital-based Payment Service Provider, formed through the landmark merger of two leading digital wallets IME Pay and Khalti. As a unified entity operating under brand name Khalti By IME, the company combines the financial strength, remittance network and innovation driven digital solutions.

companies.name: Khalti By IME
companies.description: Khalti By IME can be accessed from a mobile and serviced through any of the 45,000 plus strong agent networks. Its goal is to serve Nepal’s great majority of banked, unbanked, and underbanked customers.

companies.name: IME Co-operative Service Ltd.
companies.description: IME Cooperative was founded to provide and extend international-level financial services to people from all walks of life. It ensures its members’ long-term viability by offering financial independence, cooperation, and support for their joint economic interests, all while adhering to internationally recognized cooperative values and practices.

companies.name: Global IME Bank
companies.description: Global IME Bank is one of Nepal’s largest ‘A’ class commercial banks, boasting one of the country’s most extensive networks among private commercial banks. It was established in 2007 and currently operates with 354 branches, 369 ATMs, 322 branchless banking services, 64 revenue collection and extension counters, and 3 International Representative Offices.

companies.name: Global IME Capital Ltd.
companies.description: Global IME Capital Limited (GICL), a subsidiary of Global IME Bank Limited, holds the distinction of being the first specialised merchant bank in the history of the Nepalese Capital Market. GICL offers a comprehensive range of services, including Issue Management, Registrar to Shares, Underwriting, and Portfolio Management Services.

companies.name: Nepal Infrastructure Bank Limited
companies.description: Nepal Infrastructure Bank Limited (NIFRA) was established with a vision to become the primary financial institution in the nation for infrastructure development. As Nepal’s first infrastructure development bank, NIFRA aims to bridge the infrastructure financing gap by mobilising resources from domestic and international markets.

companies.name: Venture Hire Purchase Limited
companies.description: Venture Hire Purchase Limited is a leading Hire Purchase services institution licensed by Nepal Rastra Bank to conduct hire purchase transactions. Through Hire Purchase arrangements, it specializes in providing financial support for acquiring commercial vehicles, machinery, dozers, solar equipment, backhoe loaders, cranes, tractors, and other alternative energy products.

companies.name: IME Travels
companies.description: IME Travels and Tours, founded by IME Group in 1996, has carved a niche in the industry with its excellent travel management services. Accredited by IATA, IME Travels is also affiliated with NATA, SOTTO, PATA, and TIDC. IME Travels offers an array of tour packages in Nepal, including homestays, spiritual and adventure tours, treks, and international tour packages.

companies.name: Chandragiri Hills
companies.description: Chandragiri Hills has been established as an integrated tourist destination in the capital city of Nepal. It features a theme park with a cable car, a boutique resort, a conference hall, a view tower, a branded shop, a Zipline, and a play area for kids. It has become a must-visit place for international and domestic tourists visiting Kathmandu.

companies.name: Lake Side Retreat
companies.description: Lake Side Retreat is a resort located just a 10-minute walk from the bustling tourist centre of Pokhara. This retreat offers an ideal environment for relaxation, surrounded by acres of private gardens and featuring luxurious guest rooms, spacious terraces, modern interiors, plush accommodations, and a swimming pool.

companies.name: Hotel Le Himalaya
companies.description: Hotel Le Himalaya is a resort situated on Lazimpat, a VIP location in the Kathmandu city. It provides easy access to tourist destinations like Thamel, Durbarmarg, holy sites like Swayambhu Stupa and Pashupatinath, and neighbouring cities such as Lalitpur and Bhaktapur.

companies.name: Lumbini Cable Car Pvt Ltd.
companies.description: Lumbini Cable Car Pvt Ltd., located in Butwal-03, Rupandehi district, operates a 2.65-kilometer cable car system with 24 gondolas. The scenic 10-15 minute ride ascends over 960 meters in altitude from base station (Butwal) to the top station (Basantapur) connecting the two historically important districts of Nepal, namely Rupandehi and Palpa.

companies.name: MaulaKali Cable Car
companies.description: The Maulakali Cable Car, located at Gaidakot, Nawalpur, provides easy access to the MaulaKalika Temple, a Hindu temple situated at an elevation of 561 meters, replacing a challenging 1800-step climb with a comfortable 1200-meter ride. The cable car, equipped with 12 gondolas, can transport up to 6,000 devotees daily to the holy shrine, enhancing the spiritual experience for both domestic and international visitors.

companies.name: Ila Hotel and Resort
companies.description: Complementing to this, the project also features a luxury hotel, Ila Hotel and Resort (IHR) offering sophisticated accommodation that embodies a connection to nature and culture. Strategically located, IHR offers elegant accommodations that allow devotees to seamlessly integrate their pilgrimage with a comfortable and enriching stay, elevating both the spiritual and tourism experience in the region.

companies.name: Sikless Cable Car
companies.description: Cable Car Projects Under Construction

companies.name: Jalpadevi Cable Car
companies.description: Cable Car Projects Under Construction

companies.name: Pathivara Cable Car
companies.description: Cable Car Projects Under Construction

companies.name: IME Automotive Private Ltd.
companies.description: IME Automotives has obtained the authorised distributorship for Escorts Construction Equipment in Nepal. The company supplies heavy construction equipment such as cranes, backhoe loaders, and compaction equipment. Additionally, it is the exclusive distributor of Harley Davidson, an American motorcycle brand, in Nepal.

companies.name: Escorts Construction Equipment
companies.description: The company supplies heavy construction equipment such as cranes, backhoe loaders, and compaction equipment.

companies.name: Harley Davidson
companies.description: An American motorcycle brand, in Nepal.

companies.name: IME Motors Private Ltd.
companies.description: IME Motors has secured the authorised distributorship status for Ashok Leyland vehicles in Nepal. Ashok Leyland is India’s second-largest manufacturer of commercial vehicles, the fourth-largest manufacturer of buses globally, and the sixteenth-largest manufacturer of trucks worldwide.

companies.name: Ashok Leyland
companies.description: Ashok Leyland is India’s second-largest manufacturer of commercial vehicles, the fourth-largest manufacturer of buses globally, and the sixteenth-largest manufacturer of trucks worldwide.

companies.name: IME Electric
companies.description: IME Electric is the sole distributor of Raft Motors which tends to deliver economic, smart, innovative, stylish, comfortable and energy-efficient electric vehicles and set benchmark of eco-friendly technology for the Future Generations to follow.

companies.name: Raft Motors
companies.description: Raft Motors tends to deliver economic, smart, innovative, stylish, comfortable and energy-efficient electric vehicles and set benchmark of eco-friendly technology for the Future Generations to follow.

companies.name: Dish Media Network Private Ltd.
companies.description: Dish Media Network Limited "DishHome" is one of the fastest growing companies in Nepal’s broadcast and internet service industry. DMN was established in 2009 as Nepal’s First and only Direct-To-Home (DTH) Television service provider. The company is directly connected to 2 million-plus households from multiple platforms like Satellite TV & Fibernet (Dish Media Network), Cable TV (SIM TV), T2 TV & IPTV (Prabhu Digital).

companies.name: Dish Home
companies.description: Nepal’s first DTH brand launched by IME Group through its investment in the "Direct-to-Home" (DTH) industry.

companies.name: SIM TV
companies.description: Cable TV platform connected under Dish Media Network.

companies.name: Prabhu Digital
companies.description: T2 TV & IPTV platform connected under Dish Media Network.

companies.name: DishHome Internet
companies.description: After a long and successful experience of over 14 years in Pay-TV service, DishHome launched its FTTH Internet service under the brand name “DishHome Internet” in 2020. As of now, DishHome Internet is providing internet service to over 300,000 retail customers through certified and experienced Engineers and Technicians.

companies.name: IME General Insurance Limited
companies.description: IME General Insurance Limited is dedicated to provide general insurance services with quality, stability, expertise. It was later merged to form IGI Prudential Insurance Ltd.

companies.name: Prudential Insurance Company Limited
companies.description: A former insurance company that was merged to form IGI Prudential Insurance Ltd.

companies.name: IGI Prudential Insurance Ltd.
companies.description: IGI Prudential Insurance holds the highest paid-up capital among general insurance companies in Nepal. It was created by merging the former IME General Insurance Limited and the former Prudential Insurance Company Limited. IGI Prudential Insurance Limited offers standard general insurance services, contributing synergistically to Nepal’s financial general insurance service sector.

companies.name: IME Life Insurance Co. Ltd.
companies.description: IME Life Insurance was established with the vision of increasing awareness about life insurance, promoting financial security among the people of Nepal through life insurance products, and contributing to the nation’s development. The company has built a robust client base through agencies, corporate agencies, bancassurance, and direct channels nationwide.

companies.name: Himalayan Power Partners Ltd.
companies.description: Himalayan Power Partner Ltd. is involved in the energy sector and related projects. Himalayan Power Partner Ltd. is currently constructing the Dordikhola Hydropower Project, which has a capacity of 27 MW. IME Group has made substantial investments in the clean energy sector, particularly in hydropower generation projects.

companies.name: Mountain Energy Ltd.
companies.description: Mountain Energy Ltd. is involved in the energy sector and related projects. Mountain Energy Ltd. has successfully developed the 42 MW Mistri Khoja Project in Annapurna-4, Narchyang, Myagdi. IME Group has made substantial investments in the clean energy sector, particularly in hydropower generation projects.

companies.name: Dordikhola Hydropower Project
companies.description: Dordikhola Hydropower Project is a hydropower project which has a capacity of 27 MW. It is currently being constructed and funded through Himalayan Power Partner Ltd.

companies.name: Mistrikhola Hydropower Project
companies.description: Mistrikhola Hydropower Project is a 42 MW hydropower project in Annapurna-4, Narchyang, Myagdi. It is developed and funded through Mountain Energy Ltd.

companies.name: Middle Kaligandaki Hydropower
companies.description: Middle Kaligandaki is a 53.539 MW hydropower project located on Dhaulagiri, Nepal’s Kali Gandaki river/basin. This project is currently under construction and planned to be developed in a single phase. Upon completion of the construction, the project is expected to become operational in 2025.

companies.name: Tiplyang Kaligandaki Hydropower Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Tiplyang Kaligandaki is a 58 MW hydropower project planned for the Kali Gandaki river/basin, situated in Annapurna and Raghuganga Rural Municipality of Myagdi District. This project is also currently under construction and is slated to be developed in a single phase.

companies.name: Swift Technology Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Swift Technology Pvt. Ltd is a prominent Fin-Tech company founded in 2007, specialising in digital financial services, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, Remittance Systems, Mobile wallet, and custom software development with implementation. Swift Tech serves clients across Nepal, India, South Korea, and several other Asian countries.

companies.name: Midas Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Midas Health Services is a leading healthcare Information system solution provider in Nepal. Our system solution sustains and enhances healthcare services in Nepal. It’s backed by over 20 years of experienced team members, many of whom are expert domain consultants and accomplished professionals with extensive work experience in healthcare ERP system solutions.

companies.name: Mero Doctor
companies.description: A cloud-based healthcare service platform designed for individual doctors, healthcare institutions and patient to bridge the medical gap through online video-consultation, online appointment and EMR. It is determined to make health services more inclusive and affordable, particularly for underserved and rural patient nationwide.

companies.name: Smart Choice Technologies Limited
companies.description: Smart Choice Technologies Limited, commonly referred to as SCT, was established in 2001 and commenced operations in 2003 as the first integrated shared switching payment network service provider in Nepal. SCT has been constructing the SCT-Network as a unified platform for comprehensive digital payment solutions for Commercial Banks, Development Banks, PSP (Payment Service Providers), and other financial institutions.

companies.name: Rigo
companies.description: Rigo is a company specialising in the development of human resources and accounting software. Based in Nepal, it is run by experienced professionals with more than a decade of experience in the field. Rigo standardises and re-engineers its business practices to align with the organisational vision and maximise value.

companies.name: My Mart Nepal Private Ltd.
companies.description: My Mart is a rapidly expanding grocery store franchise chain in Nepal, and it operates as a retail business segment of the IME Group. Founded in 2016, the company began operations immediately after incorporation and is headquartered in Panipokhari, Kathmandu. In just five years of operation, My Mart has expanded its franchise stores to over 600 locations in Nepal.

companies.name: C.M Trading Enterprises Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: CM Trading Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. is the primary distributor of Ncell, Nepal’s largest telecom service provider, and offers other services such as DishHome. It also manages real estate and property finances, serving the Nepalese retail sector with world-class brands.

companies.name: Nepal Pulp and Paper Industries Private Limited
companies.description: Nepal Pulp and Paper Industries Private Limited was established on July 26, 2021, in Gaushala Nagarpalika, Ramnagar, Mahottari, Nepal. With a production capacity of 70 tons per day, it manufactures writing and printing paper distributed throughout Nepal. This ongoing project is expected to reach its optimal production capacity by Magh 2080.

companies.name: Kathmandu Technical School
companies.description: Kathmandu Technical School (KTS) offers diverse courses and skill advancement programs that prepare youth for employment opportunities in both national and global labour markets. KTS provides high-quality and in-demand courses and the opportunity to master the skills necessary for advancing in one’s career.
